title: Processor
description: A processor is an instance of a block where computation or actions would happen.

ID.title: ID
ID.description: A unique identifier for the processor.

Parent.title: Parent
Parent.description: The ID of the block that the processor is an instance of.

Ports.title: Ports
Ports.description: The IDs of spaces which must match the domain of the parent block.

Terminals.title: Terminals
Terminals.description: The IDs of spaces which must match the codomain of the parent block.
